17.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
17.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

17.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
17.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
17.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

17.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
17.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
17.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

18.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
18.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

18.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
18.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
18.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

18.gl: properly, to pour out (transitive or intransitive); by implication, to melt or cast as metal; by extension, to place firmly, to stiffen or grow hard
18.kj: cast, cleave fast, be (as) firm, grow, be hard, lay out, molten, overflow, pour (out), run out, set down, stedfast.

18.gl: literally, to load up (on the back of man or beast), i.e. to start early in the morning
18.kj: (arise, be up, get (oneself) up, rise up) early (betimes), morning.
18.dv: a primitive root; properly, to incline (the shoulder to a burden); but used only as denominative from H7926 (שְׁכֶם);

18.gl: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
18.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

18.gl: grease, especially liquid (as from the olive, often perfumed); figuratively, richness
18.kj: anointing, [idiom] fat (things), [idiom] fruitful, oil(-ed), ointment, olive, [phrase] pine.

19.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
19.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
19.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

19.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
19.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
19.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

19.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
19.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

19.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
19.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
19.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

19.gl: first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun)
19.kj: ancestor, (that were) before(-time), beginning, eldest, first, fore(-father) (-most), former (thing), of old time, past.
as for, but, howbeit, in very deed, surely, truly, wherefore.

20.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
20.kj: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad
20.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

20.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
20.kj: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

21.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

22.gl: to tithe, i.e. to take or give atenth
22.kj: [idiom] surely, give (take) the tenth, (have, take) tithe(-ing, -s), [idiom] truly.
